turns.content: I'd like to return an item please.
I can help you with that. To process your return, I'll need your order ID and the SKU of the item you'd like to return. Could you please provide those?
The order ID is ORD-10031. I don't have the SKU, but it's a hiking backpack.

Great! I found your order and the hiking backpack (SKU: HB-220). Good news, hiking backpacks are returnable within 30 days, provided they are in their original packaging and unused.

What is your reason for returning the hiking backpack?
It's too small and doesn't fit my gear.

Your return for the hiking backpack (SKU: HB-220) from order ORD-10031 has been successfully created! Your return ID is RET-E940FA.

You can find your shipping label here: https://shipping.example.com/labels/RET-E940FA. Please pack the item securely and drop it off at any shipping location.
TERMINAL_STATE: return_created
